channel.title: Cloud on KasdevTech
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud on KasdevTech

item.title: Evaluating AI Agents for Production: A Practical Guide to Strands Evals
item.description: Learn how to evaluate AI agents systematically using Strands Evals, a practical guide that covers core concepts, built-in evaluators, multi-turn simulation capabilities, and integration approaches.

item.title: Deploy Production Generative AI at the Edge Using Amazon EKS Hybrid Nodes with NVIDIA DGX
item.description: Learn how to deploy production generative AI models at the edge using AWS, specifically leveraging Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) hybrid nodes and NVIDIA's DGX system. This post covers the process of setting up a robust infrastructure for edge computing.

item.title: Open SWE: An Open-Source Framework for Internal Coding Agents
item.description: Built on Deep Agents and LangGraph, Open SWE provides core architectural components for internal coding agents.

item.title: Nvidia's agentic AI stack is the first major platform to ship with security at launch, but governance gaps remain - VentureBeat: Azure Real-World Scenario Guide
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around Nvidia's agentic AI stack is the first major platform to ship with security at launch, but governance gaps remain - VentureBeat, with implications for engineering teams.

item.title: LangChain Announces Enterprise Agentic AI Platform Built with NVIDIA
item.description: LangChain, a company dedicated to agent engineering, has announced an enterprise-grade AI platform built on NVIDIA technology. This integration allows enterprises to build, deploy, and monitor production-grade agents at scale.

item.title: Using inexpensive MicroLEDs, Microsoft networking innovation aims to make datacenters more efficient - Microsoft Source: Azure Real-World Scenario Guide
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around Using inexpensive MicroLEDs, Microsoft networking innovation aims to make datacenters more efficient - Microsoft Source, with implications for engineering teams.

item.title: Build an offline feature store using Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio and SageMaker Catalog: AI Implementation Guide
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around Build an offline feature store using Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio and SageMaker Catalog, with implications for engineering teams.

item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around OpenAI’s adult mode will reportedly be smutty, not pornographic - The Verge, with implications for engineering teams.

item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around AWS Launches Managed Openclaw on Lightsail Amid Critical Security Vulnerabilities - infoq.com, with implications for engineering teams.

item.title: x402 and Agentic Commerce: Redefining Autonomous Payments in Financial Services - Amazon Web Services (AWS): Key Updates for Builders
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around x402 and Agentic Commerce: Redefining Autonomous Payments in Financial Services - Amazon Web Services (AWS), with implications for engineering teams.

item.title: AI companies want to harvest improv actors’ skills to train AI on human emotion - The Verge: Key Updates for Builders
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around AI companies want to harvest improv actors’ skills to train AI on human emotion - The Verge, with implications for engineering teams.

item.title: P-EAGLE: Faster LLM inference with Parallel Speculative Decoding in vLLM: Key Updates for Builders
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around P-EAGLE: Faster LLM inference with Parallel Speculative Decoding in vLLM, with implications for engineering teams.

item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around Improve operational visibility for inference workloads on Amazon Bedrock with new CloudWatch metrics for TTFT and Estimated Quota Consumption, with implications for engineer

item.title: NanoClaw and Docker partner to make sandboxes the safest way for enterprises to deploy AI agents - Venturebeat: Key Updates for Builders
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around NanoClaw and Docker partner to make sandboxes the safest way for enterprises to deploy AI agents - Venturebeat, with implications for engineering teams.

item.title: Multimodal Embeddings at Scale: Building a Scalable Video Search System for Media and Entertainment
item.description: Learn how to build a scalable multimodal video search system that enables semantic search across large video datasets using Amazon Nova models and Amazon OpenSearch Service. This post explains how to move beyond manual tagging and keyword-based searches to capture the full richness of video content.

item.title: A writer is suing Grammarly for turning her and other authors into ‘AI editors’ without consent - TechCrunch: Key Updates for Builders
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around A writer is suing Grammarly for turning her and other authors into ‘AI editors’ without consent - TechCrunch, with implications for engineering teams.

item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around REST API version 2026-03-10 is now available, with implications for engineering teams.

item.title: OpenAI’s Sora Video Generator to Integrate with ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI Sora integration into ChatGPT and practical enterprise implications.
